channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Update on Fix My Street 9630885 on weight restriction sign Lobleys Drive Mway bridge, 17th June
item.description:
Update on Fix My Street 9630885 on weight restriction sign Lobleys Drive Mway bridge This sign is now lying on the ground - this critical weight restriction is now not enforceable
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lobleys Drive, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign has been vandalised (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 17th June
item.description:
Stop and go 28 days temporary footway closure please cut back overgrown hedge and vegetation and stinging netals approx 80 meters x2 meters number 2 (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 17th June
item.description:
NWD 2 way stop and go temporary footway closure please cut back overgrown hedge and vegetation and stinging netals brambles approx 40 meters x2 meters number 1 (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 17th June
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 17th June
item.description:

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 17th June
item.description:
Large branch off willow tree fell into the road but has removed and cut back by resident. Customer is concerned that the tree may be rotting away and getting weaker and may fall and is a very large/tall tree. About 15 ft tall.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 17th June
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 17th June
item.description:
Overgrown vegetation and overhanging branches restrictricting cycleway 60m FW / cycleway closure (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poor /inappropriate paving repairs, 17th June
item.description:
Outside Sainsbury's Bath Rd shopping and Hairdresser almost next door. Poor recent repair outside Sainsbury's - slab loose. Inappropriate recent repair outside hairdresser - 2 incorrect size slabs with inappropriate bezelled edges and installed too high /proud. Also tarmac infill.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 135,137, Bath Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 17th June
item.description:
Pothole next to the ones you repaired - it would save a lot of money if your contractors used their eyes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Well Place, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 17th June
item.description:
ENWD STATS REQUIRED 15MDB ROCKING KERB PLEASE RESEAT KERB CAN BE REUSED (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 17th June
item.description:
2 way stop and go 28 day please repair x1 chipped kerb stone with concrete fillet 100x100x45mm (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet
